PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed PID $p" }; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Host "Done")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess, State; Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CommandLine)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $conns | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "PID: $\($_.OwningProcess\) State: $\($_.State\) Name: $\($p.Name\)" })
